'''zhalate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantically|quantically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantically|quantically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhalate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhalate|zhalate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhalatesher|zhalatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhalatesherĂ«m|zhalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhalatero|zhalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhalateshĂ«|zhalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhalateshĂ«m|zhalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhalatero|gokizhalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhalateshĂ«|gokizhalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhalateshĂ«m|gokizhalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhalankerom|gozhalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhalankeshĂ«|gozhalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhalankeshĂ«m|gozhalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhalankeya|gozhalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhalaterom|zhalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhalatemu|zhalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhalateya|zhalateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhalaterom|gokizhalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhalatemu|gokizhalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhalateya|gokizhalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhalalate|zhalalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhalalatesher|zhalalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhalalatesherĂ«m|zhalalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhalalatero|zhalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhalalateshĂ«|zhalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhalalateshĂ«m|zhalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhalalatero|gokizhalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhalalateshĂ«|gokizhalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhalalateshĂ«m|gokizhalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhalalankerom|gozhalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhalalankeshĂ«|gozhalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhalalankeshĂ«m|gozhalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhalalankeya|gozhalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhalalaterom|zhalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhalalatemu|zhalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhalalateya|zhalalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhalalaterom|gokizhalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhalalatemu|gokizhalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhalalateya|gokizhalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠlĂŠte|zhĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠlĂŠtesher|zhĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠlĂŠtero|zhĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠlĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠlĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠlĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠlĂŠterom|zhĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠlĂŠtemu|zhĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠlĂŠteya|zhĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠlĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠlĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhaflafte|zhaflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhaflaftesher|zhaflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhaflaftesherĂ«m|zhaflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhaflaftero|zhaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhaflafteshĂ«|zhaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhaflafteshĂ«m|zhaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhaflaftero|gokizhaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhaflafteshĂ«|gokizhaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhaflafteshĂ«m|gokizhaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhaflafnkerom|gozhaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhaflafnkeshĂ«|gozhaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhaflafnkeshĂ«m|gozhaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhaflafnkeya|gozhaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhaflafterom|zhaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhaflaftemu|zhaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhaflafteya|zhaflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhaflafterom|gokizhaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhaflaftemu|gokizhaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhaflafteya|gokizhaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
